_comment: Walk-forward book freeze-stamp — RE-SEALED 2026-07-10 at the v2.7 bake (Chapter-3 injury/availability + R-i=advance). The book (s4 matrix) is id(p)-keyed, so raw-file sha256 is non-deterministic across regenerations BY DESIGN; identity is sealed on the STABLE keys (player,type,year,pick), canonicalised. ship_gates_check.py B3 compares the current S4_MATRIX stable-key sha to this baseline. Re-sealed at the candidate head 7a07e369 (store a2fbc9a0 unchanged); the recomputed stable-sha matches the independent blind audit (2a74c731). Prior seal: store correction 2026-07-09 (King/Murphy) at head 4b08796c, stable-sha ff6cf9d8.
sealed_by: v2.7 bake, owner written word 2026-07-10, DECISIONS v90 §36 ladder (prescreen + 9/9 blind audit + owner viewing). Re-sealed at the recomputed book stable-sha (== the audit's 2a74c731); store a2fbc9a0 UNCHANGED; carries head 7a07e369 / store a2fbc9a0 / config 69ead79b.
